meta.hazardAnalysis:
HAZARDS OF THE WORK AREA ENVIRONMENT TO INCLUDE AWARENESS
OF THE HAZARD COMMUNICATION PROGRAM REQUIREMENT (Employee
Right to Know) (AFI 91-202 para. A4.1.2)
HAZARDS OF THE JOB AND SPECIFIC SAFETY GUIDANCE THAT APPLIES TO
THEIR WORKPLACE (AFI 91-202 para. A4.1.1.)
PROPER PERSONAL LIFTING TECHNIQUES (AFI 91-202 para. A4.1.3.)
meta.riskManagementNotes: RISK MANAGEMENT AWARENESS TRAINING (AFI 91-202 PARA. A13.9.)
meta.trafficSafetyNotes:
REQUIREMENTS OF AIR FORCE TRAFFIC SAFETY PROGRAM, INCLUDING 
MANDATORY USE OF SEAT BELTS AND HELMETS, SPEED LIMITS, LOCAL 
TRAFFIC HAZARDS, PERSONAL RISK MANAGEMENT AND CELL PHONE 
PROHIBITION WHILE OPERATIONS A GMV OR PMV ON BASE. IF APPLICABLE, 
DISCUSS SAFETY TRAINING REQUIREMENTS BEFORE RIDING A 
MOTORCYCLE. (AFI 91-202 para. A4.1.9)
